{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Borus
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Borus]] is a suit of armor that can speak.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c7">''House of Blades'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
